events.text: Assessment complete — the wrong-listing breaker is a **fail** (high risk). Written to `/app/answer.json`: installing a breaker not listed/classified for that specific panelboard voids the UL 67 assembly listing (NEC 110.3(B)), creates uncertainty about SCCR/interrupting rating and bus fit, and must be corrected (remove, install a properly listed/classified breaker, verify SCCR and AFCI/GFCI/termination requirements) before re-inspection.
